sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, data String, hash_value FixedString(16));
INSERT INTO test_hash (id, data, hash_value) VALUES (1, 'test', hex(sipHash128ReferenceKeyed((506097522914230528, 1084818905618843912), 'example', '\x01', 5)));
UPDATE test_hash SET hash_value = hex(sipHash128ReferenceKeyed((506097522914230528, 1084818905618843912), 'updated', '\x02', 10)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data, hash_value FROM test_hash WHERE hash_value = hex(sipHash128ReferenceKeyed((506097522914230528, 1084818905618843912), 'example', '\x01', 5));
